prompt: Have 3 Claude agents in parallel implement 3 tiny string utility modules in /tmp/rocky-eval-claude-parallel: slugify(s), truncate(s,n), normalize(s). Each in its own projects/<name>/<name>.py file. Use Tier 3 with --agents claude — that means Native AgentTeam (TeamCreate + Agent(team_name=...)).
expected_tier: Phase 3.2.2 Tier 3 Claude parallel — Native AgentTeam
expected_behavior: With-skill subagent should call TeamCreate, then per-teammate Agent(subagent_type=general-purpose, team_name=..., name=..., prompt=...) for each of the 3 tasks. Each teammate writes its result file. Wait for completion via mailbox notifications. Verify all .result files. SendMessage shutdown_request, TeamDelete cleanup.
assertions: With-skill subagent called TeamCreate to create a swarm-* team
With-skill subagent called Agent(team_name=..., name=...) for at least one teammate (not bash-spawned claude --dangerously-skip-permissions)
All 3 teammates were dispatched (3 separate Agent calls with team_name)
All 3 .result files were written with Status: DONE
All 3 module files exist: projects/slug/slug.py, projects/trunc/trunc.py, projects/norm/norm.py
slugify('Hello World!') returns 'hello-world' or close (functional verification)
truncate('hello world', 5) returns 'hello...' or 'he...' (functional verification, ≤5+ellipsis chars)
normalize('  hello   world  ') returns 'hello world' (functional verification)
With-skill subagent called TeamDelete on cleanup
